subject: Litleo, a small lion-cub Pokemon with brown and cream fur and a red flame-tipped tuft on its head, posed on rocky terrain
description: A small lion-cub Pokemon stands on a rocky ledge in a warm, sunlit canyon or desert environment. The creature has round brown-and-cream body with stubby limbs, large round ears, and a distinctive red flame-like tuft sprouting from the top of its head. It faces the viewer with a wide-eyed, curious expression that reads as young and playful. The background features warm orange-red rock formations under a bright sky, reinforcing its Fire typing through both palette and environment.
foreground: small lion-cub Pokemon on a rocky ledge, facing viewer
background: warm orange-red canyon rock formations under bright sky
